zh.lifeSummary: 當Adélaide de la Fere於1056年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯拉 費艾時，她的父親Nocher DE LA FERE28歲，母親Gertrude De Coucy17歲。她和Milon de Chacenay至少有3個兒子。她去世於1109年在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內蒙特米拉爾享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Fere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Bartolo, Croce, Dante, Domenico, Giorgio, Luigi, Pietro, Salvatore, Vincenzo, Vito.  French/Haitian Guerline, Jean Marie.
Italian: from the female personal name Fede, from Latin fides ‘faith’.
Italian: from a short form of the personal name   Federico  .

variants.name: Federico
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenic, Antonio, Guerino, Armando, Salvatore, Domenico, Gino, Mario, Nino, Sal, Carmine, Guido, Alfredo, Angelo, Benito, Carmela.  Spanish Jose, Ruben, Carlos, Jesus, Rosario, Enrique, Francisco, Juan.
Italian: from the personal name Federico, of ancient Germanic origin (see Friedrich ). Compare Federick and Frederico .

variants.name: Di Fede
meanings: Italian (Sicily): patronymic or metronymic from the male or female personal name   Fede  .

nameMeanings.name: Adélaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adélaide de la Fere was born in 1056, in La Fère, Aisne, Picardie, France, her father, Nocher DE LA FERE, was 28 and her mother, Gertrude De Coucy, was 17. She had at least 3 sons with Milon de Chacenay. She died in 1109, in Montmirail, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adélaide de la Fere est née en 1056, à La Fère, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Nocher DE LA FERE, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Gertrude De Coucy, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Milon de Chacenay. Elle est décédée en 1109, à Montmirail, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adélaide de la Fere 1056 in La Fère, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nocher DE LA FERE 28 und ihre Mutter Gertrude De Coucy 17. Sie hatte mit Milon de Chacenay mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1109 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Montmirail, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaide de la Fere è nata il nel 1056 nel La Fère, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Nocher DE LA FERE, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Gertrude De Coucy, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Milon de Chacenay. Morì nel 1109, nel Montmirail, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adélaide de la Fereが1056年にフランスピカーディエイスンラ フeアで生まれた時，父Nocher DE LA FEREは28歳，母Gertrude De Coucyは17歳であった。彼女はMilon de Chacenayとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1109年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンモントミーレイルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adélaide de la Fere(이)가 1056년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 라 프e르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nocher DE LA FERE(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrude De Coucy(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Milon de Chacenay(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1109년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 몽미레이에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaide de la Fere nasceu em 1056, em La Fère, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Nocher DE LA FERE, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude De Coucy, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Milon de Chacenay. Ela faleceu em 1109, em Montmirail, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adélaide de la Fere родилась в 1056 г. в местности ла фeр, эисн, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Nocher DE LA FERE было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude De Coucy, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Milon de Chacenay. Она умерла в 1109 г. в местности монтмиреил, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adélaide de la Fere nació en 1056, en La Fère, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Nocher DE LA FERE, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Gertrude De Coucy, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Milon de Chacenay. Murió en 1109, en Montmirail, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 53 años.
